        </sbml:listOfReactants>
        <sbml:listOfProducts>
          <sbml:speciesReference species="species0x8059ad4" stoichiometry="1"/>
          <sbml:speciesReference species="species0x805dfc0" stoichiometry="1"/>
        </sbml:listOfProducts>
        <sbml:kineticLaw>
          <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML">
            <mathml:apply>
              <mathml:times/>
              <mathml:cn>9.98348e+09</mathml:cn>

        </sbml:kineticLaw>
      </sbml:reaction>
    </sbml:listOfReactions>
  </sbml:model>
</sbml:sbml>
